title: Lead Revenue Manager at Wilderness Lodges India

jsonLd.title: Lead Revenue Manager at Wilderness Lodges India
jsonLd.description:
We at Wilderness Lodges India are looking for an experienced Revenue Manager based out of Thane. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Wilderness Lodges India:
Wilderness Lodges India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Event Management
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in Opera PMS
• Proficiency in HACCP
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in Housekeeping Standards

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Wilderness Lodges India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
